questions.question: What is the main difference between NFA and DFA?
What is the purpose of using NFA?
What is the concept of epsilon transitions in NFA?
keyPoints: Allows NFA to move to new state

questions.question: Explain the relationship between NFA and DFA.
keyPoints: Every NFA can be converted to DFA
Not every DFA can be converted to NFA

questions.question: Compare and contrast NFA and DFA.
keyPoints: NFA is more convenient to design
